Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The normative process is sequential Post Screen Interview Decide Onboard Add to Payroll Close Also might have possible parallelism between screen and interview but typical is sequential

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In Model1 edges PostScreen ScreenDecide ScreenInterview DecideOnboard OnboardPayroll PayrollClose both Decide and Interview are after Screen but no ordering between Decide and Interview so decision can happen before interview violating logical order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In Model2 looponboarding OperatorLOOP children Onboard skip makes Onboard optional or repeatable xorpayroll OperatorXOR children Payroll skip makes Payroll optional also missing ordering PostScreen PostInterview InterviewDecide so screen not before interview or decide allowing decision before screening

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Both models have anomalies Model1 has ordering issue allowing decide before interview Model2 has optional essential steps onboarding payroll skips and ordering flaws Model1 ensures all steps present after decide no optionals

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Model1 closer to normative less severe anomaly than Model2 skipping essential steps fundamentally breaks process

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Model1 includes all required steps in proper sequence albeit partial order missing edge Model2 has critical optionals
